name: sbom grounds its SLSA-level claim in the slsa-framework source rather than asserting it ungrounded
command: printf '%s' '{"dependencies":{"lodash":"4.17.21","express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'slsa_level=[0-9]+ cite=slsa-framework' e.txt && echo h15-slsa-cited 1>&2
